tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Use when: the user needs to find code across repositories by keyword, symbol, or file path. Returns matching files with line ranges and repository context.

query.description: Keyword, symbol, or path to search for across indexed repositories.

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create an issue in the tracker.

tools.name: update_issue
tools.description: Use when: the user asks to change an existing issue's title, body, labels, or assignees. Returns the updated issue.

fields.description: Fields to change on the issue.

tools.name: merge_pull_request
tools.description: Merge a pull request into its base branch.

tools.name: run_ci_pipeline
tools.description: Trigger a CI pipeline run for a branch and wait for the result.
